author: Jim Eric Skogman
name: Autoresearch Low-Rank-Q + Final-Tail-Q + Tied-Embedding Float (1x5090)
blurb: Non-record 1xRTX5090 autoresearch submission from jadechip/autoresearch-parameter-golf. Best accepted line uses a compact low-rank-Q carrier, selective attention-QAT-off, delayed MLP fake quant, full-rank final-tail Q, and fp16 tied-embedding export; post-quant val_bpb 1.5295 under the 16MB cap.
